research_summary.main_result: The GhostTrace GNN achieved 85.7% accuracy on the held-out validation set.
research_summary.roc_statement: Macro-average AUC-ROC of 0.866 indicates robust discriminative performance across failure modes.
research_summary.baseline_comparison: Outperforms random baseline (50%) by 35.7% absolute accuracy.
research_summary.per_class_summary: Best class: unstable (87.5% F1). Most challenging: stable (83.3% F1).
